together,

Blazing-fast screen sharing, multiplayer control, crystal-clear voice and high-quality video. Perfect for pair programming.
Try it now, for free
Beta
From
Screenhero
to
screen
and now
Read more about our evolution
Seamless remote pair programming
Pop’s multiplayer screen sharing — where everyone controls the screen together with their own mouse and keyboard — makes it effortless to collaborate on code.
Brainstorm like you’re in the same room
Whiteboarding has never been easier. Doodle together at anytime, even from a smartphone or tablet. Simple. Fast. And you’ll never need to worry about dried-out markers.
Make actual contact
Inviting people is as easy as sending a link, and everyone can join even before registering. If you have a laptop or a smartphone, you’re in.
Some of Pop’s best features
Voice & video
Crystal-clear voice and
high-quality video
Blazing fast screen sharing
Low-latency screen sharing
optimized for live collaboration
Multiplayer meetings
Everyone can click and type on
the shared screen together
Drawing and highlighting
Exchange visual ideas in real-time
with your team
Join from anywhere
Supports Mac, Windows, Linux,
Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and
mobile browsers
Slack integration

Slack to connect with your team
even faster

Try it for free

analysis.name: Pop
analysis.value_proposition: Blazing-fast multiplayer screen sharing with crystal-clear voice and video, optimized for remote pair programming.
analysis.ideal_customer: Remote software engineering teams doing pair programming and live collaboration

features.name: screen sharing
features.description: Low-latency screen sharing optimized for live collaboration

features.name: multiplayer remote control
features.description: Everyone can click and type on the shared screen with their own mouse and keyboard
features.evidence_quote: Everyone can click and type on the shared screen together

features.name: whiteboard
features.evidence_quote: Whiteboarding has never been easier. Doodle together at anytime

features.name: drawing and highlighting
features.description: On-screen drawing and highlighting during calls
features.evidence_quote: Exchange visual ideas in real-time with your team

features.name: link-based invites
features.description: Invite anyone via a shareable link; join without registering
features.evidence_quote: Inviting people is as easy as sending a link

features.name: browser support
features.description: Works in Chrome, Firefox, and Safari
features.evidence_quote: Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and mobile browsers

features.name: mobile browser support
features.evidence_quote: even from a smartphone or tablet

features.name: slack integration
features.description: Start Pop calls directly from Slack
features.evidence_quote: Start a Pop call directly from Slack

features.name: no meeting time limit
features.description: No time limit on meeting length

differentiators: Multiplayer screen sharing where everyone controls with their own mouse and keyboard
Low-latency screen sharing optimized for pair programming
Guest join without registration via link

free_tier.limits: Join unlimited meetings only (cannot host); Pro is free while in beta

tiers.name: Starter
tiers.headline_inclusions: Join unlimited meetings, high quality screen sharing, remote control, draw/messaging

tiers.name: Pro
tiers.headline_inclusions: Host unlimited meetings, no time limit, public support forum (free while in beta)

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: All Pro features plus SSO, SAML, Slack/email support

pricing.notes: Enterprise starts at 40 licenses for $12K/year minimum; Pro tier is temporarily free during beta
